top_signals.title: Oil hits $100 for first time since May while US stocks slide
top_signals.summary: Donald Trump warns US is weighing ‘massive attack’ on Iran as Middle East tensions ratchet higher
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Asian Stocks Set to Fall as Oil Surges Past $100: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Stocks in Asia were poised for declines after a sharp Wall Street selloff, while oil surged above $100 a barrel for the first time in two months as an escalating Middle East conflict stoked fears of renewed inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Amazon and Microsoft pivot cloud gaming strategies to target different players
top_signals.summary: Amazon is bringing Luna to the Prime Video streaming service, while Microsoft will test an ad-supported streaming of titles that people own.
